phonetic: ﾉ厖位μ緩决ﾉ囘li; ﾉ厖位λ藩甚ﾉ囘li
examples: He is, assuredly, not alone in believing they will win.
But it is most assuredly possible.
More assuredly, I expect to see more fans from China, India, and Indiana watching NBA players.
That is where the professional relationship quietly, but most assuredly merges into unethical behavior.
